# CardSession.EmulationUIStatus.failure

**Case**

A status display to indicate an error, such as an exclamation mark.

## Declaration

```swift
case failure
```

## Emulation statuses

- **CardSession.EmulationUIStatus.success**: A status display to indicate a successful operation, such as a checkmark.
